name: Katalyst Media
description: Development for Craftadia and other Katalyst-owned Minecraft servers, updating legacy code and building new features.

projects.name: Craftadia
projects.description: A Minecraft survival server with a town system, rich events, and a custom plugin suite. Built a custom bank system with interest rates and withdraw logs, a treasure merchant for buying and selling loot, and a vote wheel granting server-wide random rewards.

media.caption: Custom bank system, with interest rates, withdraw logs, and more.
Spins every x votes, granting the server a random reward
